creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
<https://github.com/htop-dev/htop/issues/1537#issuecomment-2354268992> (not a bug in htop) there's a workaround, please note the closing comment: 

> Marking as WontFix, as the core issue is outside our control and the 
> only reasonable workaround would be a hard regression with unjustified 
> impact on unaffected users.
